flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Williams College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (85.3% → 71.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Williams College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.7k → $68.6k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Williams College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.7k → $68.6k).
